Comprehensive Commercial Finance Services for Australian Business Growth

Strategic finance solutions designed for commercial trades, civil contractors, and industrial businesses. Professional assessment, expert guidance, and partnership approach for sustainable growth.

Get Professional Assessment Calculate Repayments

Strategic Finance Solutions for Professional Business Growth

Edgeview Finance Business Solutions specializes in commercial finance for Australian trades and service businesses. Our comprehensive range of services is designed to support every stage of your business journey, from equipment acquisition to expansion financing.

🏗️

Equipment Finance

Strategic equipment financing for commercial trades, civil contractors, and industrial businesses. Competitive rates from $20K to $500K+ with flexible terms.

  • Heavy machinery & construction equipment
  • Commercial vehicles & fleet expansion
  • Industrial tools & workshop equipment
  • Specialised trade machinery & technology
$20K - $500K+ 1-7 years
Explore Equipment Finance →
🏢

Commercial Property Finance

Professional property finance for business premises acquisition or investment opportunities with strategic structuring.

  • Business premises purchase
  • Commercial property investment
  • Property development funding
  • Refinancing existing properties
$100K - $5M+ 5-30 years
Explore Property Finance →
💰

Working Capital Solutions

Strategic working capital and cash flow management for commercial trades and civil contractors. Support business operations and growth initiatives.

  • Cash flow bridging for payment delays
  • Invoice factoring & discounting
  • Business line of credit facilities
  • Seasonal funding for peak demand
$50K - $1M+ Flexible terms
Explore Working Capital →
📄

Invoice Financing

Unlock cash tied up in unpaid invoices to smooth cash flow and fund ongoing commercial work. Ideal for established trade businesses.

  • 80-100% invoice value upfront
  • Selective invoice finance options
  • Commercial client payment acceleration
  • AI-driven cash flow optimization
$25K - $500K+ 30-90 days
Explore Invoice Finance →
🏠

Personal Home Lending

Professional home lending services for business owners, leveraging commercial success for competitive personal finance terms.

  • Owner-occupier home loans
  • Investment property finance
  • Self-employed lending solutions
  • Equity release for business growth
$200K - $2M+ 15-30 years
Explore Personal Lending →

Our Professional Assessment Process

1

Initial Consultation

Comprehensive discussion of your business goals, financial requirements, and growth objectives. Understanding your "Ben the Business Builder" journey.

2

Financial Assessment

Professional analysis of your business financials, borrowing capacity, and optimal finance structure using AI-enhanced analytics.

3

Strategic Structuring

Design finance solutions aligned with your business cycle, cash flow patterns, and growth timeline for optimal outcomes.

4

Lender Matching

Access our network of specialist commercial lenders to secure competitive terms and conditions for your specific industry.

5

Application Management

Professional presentation and management of your application through to settlement, ensuring smooth process and optimal outcomes.

6

Ongoing Partnership

Continued support for future growth requirements, refinancing opportunities, and strategic finance optimization.

Industries We Serve

Specializing in commercial trades, civil contractors, and industrial businesses across Australia. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities in these sectors.

Commercial Trades

Electricians, plumbers, HVAC, commercial cleaning, security services, and specialized trade contractors.

Civil Contractors

Earthmoving, excavation, road construction, drainage, utilities, and infrastructure contractors.

Transport & Logistics

Freight operators, courier services, warehousing, distribution, and logistics management.

Manufacturing

Light manufacturing, fabrication, processing, packaging, and industrial production.

Construction Services

Commercial construction, fit-outs, project management, and construction support services.

Industrial Services

Maintenance, repairs, technical services, and specialized industrial support operations.

Note: We focus on sustainable commercial sectors and exclude residential building to concentrate on businesses with stable cash flows and growth potential.

Ready to Partner for Strategic Business Growth?

Join hundreds of Australian business builders who've secured strategic finance solutions through our professional partnership approach.
